title: Franky and Robin Search Separately
description: On pages 9–12, this part follows Unknown person #1, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Fish-Men, Narrator, Franky, Hody Jones, New Fish-Man Pirates. The core story beat is franky and robin search separately.
scene: The scene centers on franky and robin search separately, with Unknown person #1, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Fish-Men, Narrator, Franky, Hody Jones, New Fish-Man Pirates driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...that's one billing merman...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: I think I prefer mermaids to Mermen, myself...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's one weird-looking shaggy old dude...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Show some respect, guys!!! You're supposed to bow!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's a cute whale!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Does he have some business... with those humans...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hoee Eell!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Megalo.

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: You are sure these are the humans in question?

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Huh? That shark... we saw it back before we reached the island...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Hey!! Straw hat humans!! I hereby invite you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...to join me in Ryuguguu Palace!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: The depths, near the fishman district "Noah"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is that the fastest you can row?! They'll find us at this rate!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's not easy navigating deep- sea currents, you know!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I knew we should have had the ship fitted with a paddle wheel!! We'll never survive the new world like this...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...Huh...? Captain!! There's something up ahead!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HORDY JONES!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: H... He's found us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What the...?! he... he's wearing handcuffs!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Jahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahah

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is quite the nasty item we've got our hands on...!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Superdrug "energy steroid".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WH... where did that fishy bastard go?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He charged straight at the ship!!! He's opened a hole in our hull!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AaaARGHHHAHA!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He's inside the ship!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Take him out!!! He's only one man!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AaaAA 6HH!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: cap- rain!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Haaaaaaa ha hahhh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I've faced Fishmen before!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You have no idea what I've been through to make it this far...!!!

summary: Franky and Robin Search Separately. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
